ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer, microphone) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was deployed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readings" (
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reading */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that took the reading */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the reading */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the reading */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the reading */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the reading */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the reading */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed at the time of the reading */,
  "sound" REAL /* Sound level at the time of the reading */,
  "light" INTEGER /* Light intensity at the time of the reading */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the reading */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the reading */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Data quality indicator (e.g., good, bad, uncertain) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reading_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readings_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensors table */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Read permission */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Write permission */,
  "delete" INTEGER /* Delete permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the research_teams table */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the users table */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensors table */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the data request */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the data request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomalies" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the sensors table */,
  "reading_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the readings table */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly detected */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomalies_reading_id FOREIGN KEY ("reading_id") REFERENCES readings ("reading_id")
)
